text:
Seven PRs merged today. The Pollen activity view is cleaner and no longer repeats itself; model search means less dashboard archaeology; Muse Spark 1.1 moved onto the shelf; and the Python quick-start now remembers the important little /v1. Media docs and README images were repaired too. Software gardening, basically. 🌱🐝

Details in the repo: github.com/pollinations/pollinations
